the highlighted section is: gobi desert

the gobi desert is one of the most famous tourist attractions in mongolia. it is a large desert that covers much of the southern part of the country. the gobi is known for its unique landscapes, including sand dunes, rocky mountains, and ancient ruins. it is also home to a variety of wildlife, including the elusive snow leopard. in addition to the gobi desert, other famous tourist attractions in mongolia include the orkhon valley, the capital city of ulan bator, and the khongoryn elst monastery. these places offer visitors a chance to experience the rich culture and natural beauty of mongolia.
